title: Dehradun, Uttarakhand — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dehradun, Uttarakhand: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dehradun is a city in Uttarakhand with a population of 800,000. The capital of Uttarakhand, a scenic valley city at the foothills of the Himalayas, known for its boarding schools and natural beauty.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
